title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・先に続くこの道よ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One loses the autumn Tenno Sho, but it still
makes for a good experience leading up to the
Tokyo Daishoten.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We renew our spirits and aim to return to Oi
Racecourse one day.
